verdicts.note: Project-name key (corporate-style) per bib-check rule §5; first author is Isaev but key is the tool name.

verdicts.issue: Key year is 2022 but entry year is 2023 (preprint vs JMLR publication). Author list uses 'and others' which is acceptable for a 67-author paper, but full pages 1--113 are correct for issue 240. Consider whether DOI should be added (10.5555/3648699.3648939).

Wrong entry type. NeurIPS papers are conference proceedings (@inproceedings), not @article. The 'journal' field 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems' should be a 'booktitle'. Missing publisher (Curran Associates), missing pages (1223--1231), and the venue name should be expanded to 'Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)' per rule §2. Author list uses 'and others' but full list is Dean, Corrado, Monga, Chen, Devin, Le, Mao, Ranzato, Senior, Tucker, Yang, Ng.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)

verdicts.note: Booktitle could be expanded to 'IEEE International Symposium on High-Performance Computer Architecture (HPCA)' per rule §2 (already correct format).

verdicts.issue: Key surname mismatch (rule §5). Key prefix 'kim' does not match author 'Li, Cheng'. The llm-analysis tool was created by Cheng Li (GitHub: cli99). The key should be renamed to 'li2023llmanalysis'. The entry's body content is correct.

suggested_fix._rename_note: Renaming the key requires updating every [@kim2023llmanalysis] reference across associated source files (mlsysim paper .qmd/.tex). Search the mlsysim/paper directory for citations before renaming.

verdicts.note: Could add DOI 10.1109/TC.1985.6312192 for completeness, though entry is otherwise complete.
Author field uses corporate-style '{Llama Team, AI \@ Meta}' which is unusual but acceptable for a corporate-byline paper.

verdicts.issue: Entry is correct in content but missing DOI (10.14778/3446095.3446100). Per rule §4, DOI should be the canonical locator when available. Adding it would close the open audit.

Wrong entry type and inconsistent venue. PVLDB (Proceedings of the VLDB Endowment) is published as a journal with volume/number/pages, not as conference proceedings. Type should be @article, not @inproceedings. The entry already has volume=14, number=12, pages=2945--2958, which are journal-shape fields. The 'booktitle' field should become 'journal'. Missing DOI 10.14778/3476311.3476374.

verdicts.note: Author list uses 'and others' but full list is Patterson, Gonzalez, Le, Liang, Munguia, Rothchild, So, Texier, Dean. Acceptable as preprint citation.
Booktitle 'ACM SIGKDD International Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining' could be expanded to '... (KDD)' for parenthetical-acronym consistency per rule §2.
Could add pages 283--294 from IEEE Xplore for completeness.

verdicts.issue: Author list uses 'and others' which truncates a 14-author paper. First three authors (Yuan, Shang, Zhou) are correct. Per rule §4a, full author lists are preferred but 'and others' is acceptable for survey papers with very long author lists. Consider expanding for MIT Press style.

suggested_fix.author: Yuan, Zhihang and Shang, Yuzhang and Zhou, Yang and Dong, Zhen and Zhou, Zhe and Xue, Chenhao and Wu, Bingzhe and Li, Zhikai and Gu, Qingyi and Lee, Yong Jae and Yan, Yan and Chen, Beidi and Sun, Guangyu and Keutzer, Kurt

verdicts.note: Author list uses 'and others' but verified first three (Zheng, Yin, Xie). Full list available if MIT Press style requires expansion.
